The Energy Security Team leads the OCEEA’s work on energy security, focusing on critical energy infrastructure protection, sustainable energy, energy efficiency and facilitating dialogue among participating States. Energy Transition Expert Chisinau (Norwegian citizenship only) Moldova POSTING DATE03/27/2026 BE THE FIRST TO APPLY NORCAP will support Moldova’s Ministry of Energy by providing an expert to advance the country’s shift toward cleaner and more efficient energy systems. The expert will strengthen national capacities in electrification, energy efficiency, smart energy systems and green mobility, offering targeted technical and strategic guidance to improve policy design, financing tools, regulatory alignment and implementation across key areas such as heat pumps, smart grids, building electrification and digitalisation Climate Peace Security Data Analyst, UNMISS, Juba Juba, South Sudan POSTING DATE03/24/2026 TRENDING NORCAP is looking to recruit a climate peace security data analyst for UNMISS in Juba Chief Medical Officer OSCE Vienna (Norwegian citizens only) Vienna, Austria POSTING DATE03/27/2026 BE THE FIRST TO APPLY The Organization for Security and Co‑operation in Europe (OSCE) is the world’s largest regional security organization, comprising 57 participating States across Europe, Central Asia, and North America. It serves as a platform for dialogue, cooperation, and conflict prevention, promoting stability through a broad concept of security that includes politico‑military, economic‑environmental, and human rights dimensions. Our Talent Community JOIN OUR TALENT COMMUNITY Administration Coordinator, ACAPS Ukraine Analysis Hub (Internal Candidates Only) Kyiv, Ukraine (Hybrid) POSTING DATE04/02/2026 The Administration Coordinator will oversee and strengthen all administrative, procurement, and operational processes within the Ukraine Analysis Hub, ensuring smooth day-to-day functioning of the team following the hub’s restructuring. This position is only open to internal candidates (current employees and those who have worked with NRC over the last 2 years). Head of Unit African Multilateral Partnerships Oslo, Norway (Hybrid) POSTING DATE03/20/2026 TRENDING The African Multilateral Partnerships Unit works strategically to invest in regional, and thereby also national, capacity to support African visions of an integrated, prosperous, and peaceful Africa driven by its own citizens. Head of Unit Peace and Democracy Oslo, Norway (Hybrid) POSTING DATE03/20/2026 TRENDING The Head of Peace and Democracy Unit works strategically to invest in the international community and national stakeholders capacity and ability to promote and protect democracy and credible elections, human rights, rule of law, and peace. This includes line management of unit members, providing operational and technical support, and providing strategic direction, as well as programme and policy development and implementation aimed at strengthening responses, systems, and partnerships.
